name: Texas Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 small jalapeno or 3 serranos chopped fine
6 - 12 sprigs of cilantro (coriander leaves) chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomatoes, onion, jalapeno, and serranos finely.
2. Add the chopped cilantro and salt to a food processor or blender.
3. Process until smooth and enjoy immediately or within 3 hours for best flavor.
4. Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for several days.
5. If using jalapenos, the salsa will retain its heat. If using serranos, it may become milder over time.
6. Use the salsa as a topping for taco salads and baked potatoes.
